mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_questions (id, survey_id, seq, type, title, is_required, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{surveyId}, #{seq}, #{type}, #{title}, #{isRequired}, #{createdAt})
INSERT INTO survey_options (id, question_id, seq, option_label) VALUES (#{id}, #{questionId}, #{seq}, #{optionLabel})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, status, start_at, end_at, created_by_user_id, created_by_username, created_by_name, created_at FROM surveys WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, title, description, status, start_at, end_at, created_by_user_id, created_by_username, created_by_name, created_at FROM surveys ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, title, description, status, start_at, end_at, created_by_user_id, created_by_username, created_by_name, created_at FROM surveys WHERE id = #{surveyId}
SELECT id, survey_id, seq, type, title, is_required, created_at FROM survey_questions WHERE survey_id = #{surveyId} ORDER BY seq ASC
SELECT o.id, o.question_id, o.seq, o.option_label FROM survey_options o INNER JOIN survey_questions q ON q.id = o.question_id WHERE q.survey_id = #{surveyId} ORDER BY q.seq ASC, o.seq ASC

SELECT o.id, o.question_id, o.seq, o.option_label, COALESCE(COUNT(a.id), 0) AS vote_count FROM survey_options o LEFT JOIN survey_answers a ON a.option_id = o.id AND a.question_id = o.question_id WHERE o.question_id = #{questionId} GROUP BY o.id, o.question_id, o.seq, o.option_label ORDER BY o.seq ASC
SELECT answer_text FROM survey_answers WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND answer_text IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(answer_text) <> '' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_responses (id, survey_id, user_id, username, user_name, submitted_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{surveyId}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{displayName}, #{submittedAt})
INSERT INTO survey_answers (id, response_id, survey_id, question_id, option_id, answer_text, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{responseId}, #{surveyId}, #{questionId}, #{optionId}, NULL, #{createdAt})
INSERT INTO survey_answers (id, response_id, survey_id, question_id, option_id, answer_text, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{responseId}, #{surveyId}, #{questionId}, NULL, #{answerText}, #{createdAt})
